# PUBLIC-SCOPE

This repository is the public full-version UMG Block Library surface.

Included here:
- public-safe doctrine
- public-safe schema/templates
- curated manifests
- baseline readable/public-safe block libraries
- selected HUMAN-readable explanation surfaces

Not included here:
- live runtime state
- private-only operational paths
- backups, staging, traces, rollback history
- low-quality extracted artifacts
- unknown-type extracted artifacts
- private-only sleeves and proprietary runtime material
